summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI orb visual correction implementation across login, onboarding, and dashboard flows. All key features working correctly with proper orb visuals replacing 'T' icons as AI core.

ui_bugs.issue: Orb element appears unstable during desktop testing (element not stable for clicks)
ui_bugs.workaround: Element is visually present and functional, stability issue is minor UI animation related

passed_tests: Login page: AI orb (data-testid='login-orb') displays correctly at top with radial gradient
Login page: 'Welcome back' and 'Your command centre is ready' text visible and properly positioned
Login page: Form panel positioned below orb as secondary element
Onboarding: AI orb (data-testid='onboarding-orb') visible above each step creating AI-guided feel
Onboarding: 6-step flow completes successfully with centered layout
Dashboard mobile (390px): AI orb (data-testid='mobile-ai-orb') displays standalone, not in panel
Dashboard desktop (1024px): AI orb (data-testid='ai-core-button') displays standalone, not in panel
AI Core overlay opens successfully with orb visual in header (no 'T' text as core)
Full flow navigation: login → onboarding → dashboard works correctly
All dashboard content intact: attention needed section, active projects, revenue stats
No 'T' icons used as AI core visual (only acceptable logo 'T' in topbar)
AI interaction with mocked responses working correctly
